title: Add parallel group support to WrapupStep and decomposition prompt
description:
Extend the wrapup step model and parsing to support parallel execution groups.

Changes to internal/wrapup/step_prompt.go:
1. Add Group int field to WrapupStep struct (json:"group"). Steps with the same group number run in parallel. Groups execute sequentially (group 1 before group 2).

Changes to internal/wrapup/parse.go:
2. Update decompositionPrompt to instruct the agent to assign group numbers:
   - Steps that are independent (e.g. two different reviews) get the same group
   - Steps that depend on earlier results (e.g. simplify after review) get a higher group
   - Example: review (group 1), codex review (group 1), simplify (group 2)
3. Update parseStepsJSON to handle the new group field. Default group=0 if omitted (treated as sequential).

Changes to internal/wrapup/parse_test.go:
4. Add test for group assignment in parsed output.

Files: internal/wrapup/step_prompt.go, internal/wrapup/parse.go, internal/wrapup/parse_test.go
closed_reason: Added Group int field to WrapupStep struct, updated decompositionPrompt with group assignment instructions (same group = parallel, higher group = depends on earlier), updated strictRetryPrompt to include group key, added tests for group parsing and zero-default behavior.
